titleStmt.title: SII 31.232: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 232. (A.R. No. B 313 of 1936.) INDUKŪRU, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the village Chāvaḍi.
This record is dated in Śaka 1647 (wrong for Śaka 1649), Plava, Māgha śu. 15, Monday corresponding to 1727 A.D. January 23.

Records the construction of a new temple for the god Chaṁnakēśava, consecration of the principal deity and Utsava vigrahās and also made the gift of lands situated at Kīrttipallee for maintaining the lamp and offering to the god by Rājaśrī Gōvadhanadāsu of Chandragiri. It further records the appointment of Mirāśidār Bollavaraṁ Kishṭaya Narasaya, as archaka for the temple, with a remuneration of one ga per month. It further records the gift of land situated at Naḍimidbōva to the main architect (Doḍḍavōju) Vaḍla Guruvābaṭṭu of Yiṁdupūri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1647(9) Agunanēṭi plavanāma
saṁvatsara māṣu śu 15 mī sōmavāraṁ
śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmaṁḍanāya
kuṁḍainaṭuvaṁṭi yiṁdapūri caṁnakēśa
vasvāmini rājaśrīgōva¨rdhanudāsukini caṁ
dragirigāru nūtanadēvālayaṁ kaṭṭiṁcci
cci mūlavigrahaṁ vutsava vigrahalanu
cēyiṁci pratiṣṭha mahācca(tsa)vaṁ cēyiṁ
ci taḷike dīpārāthanaku kī¨rtti pallidō
vanu jaṁbimānu cēnu Ê 4 mu tōṭa
ma . hayidigāka nela . ki ga . cō
ppuna grāmāna kaṭṭaḍa cēyiṁcci yī
grāma mirāśidārulaina bōllavaraṁ kiṣṭa
ya narasayagārini A¨rccukaṁ ¨rninayaṁ cēsi
nāraṁ . dēvālayaṁ kaṭṭinaṁduku doḍḍavōju
yiṁdupūri paḍlagurvābattuniki naḍimi dō
vanu rēgaḍacēnu mānyaṁ 1 ḍu yī pakrā
raṁ tiniveśnilāla śāsaneṁ . Read vēśina śilāśāsanaṁ
yītha¨rmānaku yavaru Āccedana ce(cē)
na kāśilō gōbrāṁhmaṇavatha cēsina
pāpāna pōduru . svadatā dviguṇaṁpu
ṇyā(ṇya)ṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāvaharēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 31.232 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
